title: Volunx Solar LED Lights 20M/65ft 200LED RGB Multicoloured Christmas String Lights Outdoor, 8 Modes, Solar Garden Light Waterproof Copper Wire, Tree Patio, Yard, Party, Wedding, Decor
features: Solar Lights 20M/65ft 200 Super Bright LED String Lights built-in rechargeable NI-MH battery, Expose the solar panel to direct sunshine and make sure the solar panel faces directly to the sun.working up to 10 hours after fully charged. Ideal for decorating your patio, garden, lawn, porch, gate, yard, Christmas trees, wedding, party etc.

Flexible fairy lights, no tools required, can easily build into the shapes you want; simply wrap around tree trunks or gazebos , patio, furniture; when darkness, the wire fades to invisible, leaving only the bright lights
Solar outdoor light with 8 lighting modes including combination, fireflies flashing, waves, fading, chasing/flashing, fading slowly, twinkle/flashing and steady on

This solar fairy lights is thin and flexible, you can easily built to any shape, wrap around tree trunks or fence. Auto ON at dark when you turn on the light, Auto OFF by day. Designed with adjustable solar panel and rechargeable battery.

Waterproof IP65 design, they are completely waterproof and will be fine outside in any kind of weather. With high battery capacity which increase to 800MA, As long as you put it in a sunny place during the day, It can work up to 8-12 hours after fully charge
description: LED Outdoor Solar Lights Copper String Fairy Christmas Wedding Party Garden Features: 1. AUTOMATICALLY & WATERPROOF: Being exposed to sunshine during the day, and it begins to light up at night automatically when power on. All light bulbs are in line with waterproof grade IP65. 2. ECO-FRIENDLY: Solar powered, long working time - let the solar panel face sunshine directly during the day, the bulbs will light up automatically at night for 8 hours. 3. EASY TO USE: 8 light modes: steady on/ off/ flashing 4. GOOD DECOR & BEST GIFT: Star - like appearance makes your environment looks romantic and cozy, really stand out. Brief Introduction: The solar light consists of a solar cell, a rechargeable battery and LED lights. And the three parts are preassembled. Light from the sun charges the battery during the daytime and the energy stored in the batteries powers the lights at night. The lighting time maybe vary, depending on how much power received from sunlight during day time. Available for all kind of party or holiday! Charging time:about 8-10 hours under sufficient sunlight Working time: about 6-8 hours when fully charged Specifications: 1. Light color: Multicolor/White/Warm White/Blue 2. LED quantity: 10M 100 LEDs; 30M 300 LEDs + 2M Extension wire (Down-lead) 3. Rechargeable Battery: 1.2v 600MA 4. Solar Panel: 2V 170mA/ 300mA 5. Lighting Mode:8 light modes: steady on/ off/ flashing 6. The whole light is waterproof: IP65 ( can be used outdoor ,do not put into water) 10. Solar panel with ground stake for easy positioning 11. Working Temperature: -40 degree --- 60 degree 12. LED Life: > 50000 hours Note: 1. The light is designed for outdoor use only in an open location for receiving direct sunlight. 2. Please avoid putting the unit under shadows from buildings, trees and walls. 3. The units are designed to illuminate in dark conditions and may not operate if other sources of strong lights reflect on the panel
